Raydium Semiconductor Corp. - Strictly Confidential Raydium Next-Gen Display Driver IC Technical Spe
ver IC Technical Specification Sheet - v2.4.0 (2026) 1. System Overview The RD-AI-2026 is a premium
I-2026 is a premium High-Definition Display Driver IC (DDIC) designed with an embedded Edge-AI infer
bedded Edge-AI inference engine. It supports real-time super-resolution, AI-driven motion blur reduc
en motion blur reduction, and dynamic power optimization for OLED and high-refresh-rate mobile scree
sh-rate mobile screens. By utilizing Model Context Protocol (MCP) server bindings, the hardware conf
s, the hardware configuration can be dynamically mapped and simulated through high-level software ag
gh-level software agents. Table 1.1: Electrical & Operating Parameters Parameter Min Value Max Value
Min Value Max Value Interface / Protocol Core Operating Voltage (VDD) 0.75V 1.25V Internal DC-DC I/
5V Internal DC-DC I/O Supply Voltage (IOVDD) 1.65V 1.95V MIPI DSI-2 / SPI Maximum Clock Frequency 40
m Clock Frequency 400 MHz 1.2 GHz System PLL Standby Power Consumption 12 uA 45 uA Deep Sleep Mode P
uA Deep Sleep Mode Page 1 Raydium Semiconductor Corp. - Strictly Confidential 2. Register Map & Conf
Register Map & Configuration Tooling Host communication is implemented via standard 4-wire SPI or M
dard 4-wire SPI or MIPI Command Mode. The built-in AI accelerator is initialized by flashing the fir
by flashing the firmware into the adapter memory zone. Below is the recommended initialization sequ
initialization sequence matrix for the AI upscaling pipe: Address Register Name Default Hex Functio
Default Hex Functional Description 0x00A0 AI_EN_REG 0x00000000 Bit[0]: Enable inference engine laye
nference engine layer calibration. 0x00A4 LORA_ADPT_PTR 0x3F001200 32-bit pointer targeting localize
r targeting localized weight offset matrix. 0x00B0 THRES_CONF_VAL 0x0000FF7F Confidence score cut-of
fidence score cut-off for object detection bounding boxes. 0x00C2 ERR_LOG_CTRL 0x00000001 Trigger re
x00000001 Trigger register for hardware diagnostic dump sequence. Page 2
